definition:
1. to stuff , 
2. with genitive rei, to stuff full of , only in Pass., νήματος βεβυσμένος stuffed full of  spun-work or yarn, (Odyssey by Homer); τὸ στόμα ἐβέβυστο [i.e. χρυσοῦ] (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. with dative rei, to stop  or bung up with, plug : Pass., σπογγίωι βεβυσμένος (Aristophanes Comicus) 
4. absolute, βεβ. τὰ ὦτα deaf , (Lucian) (ML)
